prompt: Create a hyper-realistic commercial product splash shot of a large white plastic whey protein tub labeled PUREZZA and WHEYPRO, floating slightly above a glass filled with thick chocolate protein shake. The tub is centered, angled slightly to the right, with a clean glossy surface and a bold blue, white, and black label design. The label should prominently read “100% WPC PROTEIN MILK” and include small nutrition callouts such as “82G PROTEIN,” “2G SUGAR/SERVING,” “119% RDI OF VC,” “100% CHOLINE,” a circular “GMP” badge, a black strip reading “WHEY MILK PROTEIN CONCENTRATE,” another strip reading “LOW SUGAR / LOW FAT / RICH NATURAL,” and a flavor tag reading BLACK COOKIES FLAVOUR. Surround the tub with an explosive upward and outward splash of glossy chocolate liquid, with dramatic arcs, droplets, and suspended motion frozen in midair. Include exactly 5 whole chocolate sandwich cookies flying around the product and multiple broken cookie chunks and crumbs scattered throughout the scene, with one partially visible cookie near the lower right and another near the upper left. The glass at the bottom should be only partially visible, transparent, and overflowing from the impact of the splash. Use a high-contrast studio background with a dark deep blue gradient on the left fading to bright white on the right, cinematic rim lighting, crisp reflections, ultra-sharp focus on the tub, and detailed texture in the liquid and cookie crumbs. The overall look should be premium sports nutrition advertising, dynamic, energetic, and suitable for a hero image on a modern ecommerce fitness website.
